# Escalation Process

At Acme Shop, the escalation process is designed to elevate unresolved customer issues to a specialist team after two unsuccessful support attempts. Customers can request escalation by informing their support agent, who will document the request and forward it promptly. Specialist teams, equipped to handle complex issues like technical glitches and billing discrepancies, will review the case within 3 to 5 business days, with no additional fees charged for this service. Additionally, certain cases involving safety or legal concerns are prioritized, and unresolved issues may eventually be escalated to management for final resolution.

[Source: customer_support.md#escalation-process]
